roleSelection.title: How would you like to use Fixam?
roleSelection.subtitle: Choose how you want to join. You can add another account type later.
roleSelection.workDesc: Grow your business and find local service tasks to complete.

onboarding.slide1Desc:
Connect with the best professionals
in your neighborhood for any task.
onboarding.slide2Desc:
All service providers are verified
and reviewed by the community.
onboarding.slide3Desc:
Fixam connects you with trusted local pros.
After the job is complete, you pay them directly.

login.subtitle: Sign in to continue with professional services in your area.

register.subtitle: Set up your Fixam account details.
register.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, and 1 number.
register.termsRequired: Please accept the Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy before creating your account.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address or phone number and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.alertBody: This feature is currently not fully configured on the backend. A reset link would normally be sent.
forgotPassword.alertError: Please enter your email or phone number.

permissions.locationTitle: Allow Fixam to use your location?
permissions.locationText: We use your location to show nearby tasks, providers, arrival estimates, and better local matches.
permissions.notificationText: We use notifications for new messages, job requests, status changes, reminders, and safety updates.
permissions.safetyTextClient: Check the verification badge, reviews, ratings, and task details before accepting a provider.
permissions.safetyTextProvider: Keep your profile accurate and communicate inside Fixam so clients can trust your work.
permissions.paymentText: Fixam connects clients and providers. After the work, payment is handled directly.

settings.title: Settings
settings.profileDesc: View and edit your public profile
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and app preferences

messages.title: Messages
messages.emptyDesc: Conversations with taskers or clients will appear here.

profile.title: Profile
profile.bookBeforeMessaging: You must book this provider first to send messages.
profile.coinDeducted: will be deducted from your wallet
profile.bookingDescription: Booking this provider will unlock direct messaging and allow you to coordinate the service.
profile.bookingConfirmed: Provider booked successfully! You can now message them.
profile.bookingFailed: Failed to book provider. Please try again.

feedback.title: Send Feedback
feedback.subtitle: Tell us what to improve or what is not working well.

providerSetup.title: Professional Setup
providerSetup.subtitle: Add the details clients need before they can trust and hire you.
providerSetup.experiencePlaceholder: Example: 5 years repairing home electrical systems
providerSetup.bioPlaceholder: Tell clients what you do best and how you work.

bookings.title: Book Service
bookings.sentBody: The provider will see this under My Jobs > Bookings.

payments.paymentInstructions: You will receive a prompt to confirm the payment for {{price}}.
payments.submitPaymentFailed: Payment submission failed. Please try again.

tour.welcomeProviderBody: Your Fixam provider account is live. Top up your wallet, turn on your availability, and start applying for tasks near you. Clients are already posting jobs — let's get you your first one.
tour.welcomeClientBody: Your account is ready. Post your first task in seconds, browse verified local professionals near you, and pay only after the job is done. Let's show you around.
tour.providerTopUpText: You need coins to apply for tasks. Tap Top Up to add coins via MTN MoMo or Orange Money.
tour.providerOnlineText: Toggle this switch to Online — clients nearby can only see and request you when you're online.
tour.providerFindJobsText: Tap Find Jobs here to browse all open tasks near you and apply with one tap.
tour.providerViewAllText: Scroll down to see real tasks posted by clients near you right now. Tap Apply to send your offer.
tour.clientPostText: Tap this button to describe what you need, set your budget and location. Providers near you will respond fast.
tour.clientTopUpText: Add coins to book providers and unlock direct messaging. MTN MoMo and Orange Money accepted.
tour.clientBrowseText: Tap View All to see all verified providers near you. Filter by skill, rating, and availability.
tour.clientMyTasksText: Tap My Tasks here to see the live status of every job you've posted — from open to completed.

errors.registrationFailed: Failed to complete registration. Please try again.

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.subtitle: This action cannot be undone
deleteAccount.warning1: All your personal data will be permanently deleted
deleteAccount.warning2: Your active bookings will be cancelled
deleteAccount.warning3: Your wallet balance will be lost
deleteAccount.warning4: You will not be able to recover your account
deleteAccount.confirmSubtitle: Enter your password to confirm account deletion

jobs.chooseProviderBody: Are you sure you want to hire {{name}} for this task?
